future_execution_steps.description: Confirm Alembic catalog head matches target_revision_id before any session.
Re-verify duplicate_source_absent and organization_scope for the target org.
Require explicit operator confirmation aligned with required_operator_confirmation.
Bind one governed row for nf_active_opportunity_sources per approved payload.
Run post_creation_validation_checklist without activation or side pipelines.

required_current_revision_check.notes: Verify migration revision 0019 is current before write-capable session.

required_duplicate_source_check.notes: Ensure dedupe_key_strategy does not collide with an existing governed row.

required_operator_confirmation.notes: Future sprint must capture explicit operator confirmation outside Sprint 59.

required_organization_scope_check.notes: organization_id must remain within approved operator scope.

required_post_creation_validation.notes: Structured validation only; no activation or ingestion side effects.

Run post-creation validation without activation or side pipelines.
